notes: Subtensions transcribed from the official Vortex EBR-7D MRAD reticle manual (M-00313-0). Total horizontal extent 10.1 mil; total vertical extent 10.5 mil (open above center, drop scale below). Center dot 0.03 mil. Drop scale uses 0.2 mil minor / 0.4 mil major spacing along the wind grid. Wind dot pattern in lower half on every other drop line.

Subtensions transcribed from the official Vortex EBR-7D MOA reticle manual (M-00312-0). Total horizontal extent 28.5 MOA; total vertical extent 38 MOA (open above center, drop scale below). Center dot 0.1 MOA. Hash subtensions: 0.2 MOA fine ticks, 0.5 MOA medium ticks, 1 MOA hashes between major lines, 1.25 MOA wind grid major spacing, labeled every 5 MOA.

Subtensions transcribed from the official Vortex EBR-7C MRAD reticle manual (M-00271-1). Total horizontal extent 10 mil; total vertical extent 11 mil (drop scale below). Center dot 0.04 mil. Major hash subtensions: 0.5 mil along horizontal stadia. Wind dots on drop lines at 0.5 mil intervals. Wind grid uses 0.5 mil major spacing.

Catalog placeholder for the EBR-2C MRAD reticle option offered on the Razor HD Gen II 4.5-27x56. Geometry not yet transcribed from a manufacturer subtension diagram, so verified=false and elements are intentionally omitted (the picker MUST surface a placeholder warning until the diagram is captured from VTX_M-002XX-0_EBR-2C_MRAD_RM_WEB.pdf).
Catalog placeholder for the EBR-2C MOA reticle option offered on the Razor HD Gen II 4.5-27x56. Subtension diagram not yet transcribed; verified=false and elements omitted.

Subtension dictionary transcribed from the official Horus Vision Tremor3 Technical Data Sheet (Copyright 2019 Horus Vision). Per-element renderable geometry deliberately NOT populated -- converting the 5-page Horus diagram (ranging bars, drop scale, wind dot grid, chevron mil markers, secondary horizontal lines, holdover crosses) into the LoadOut element vocabulary is a follow-up task. verified=false until the elements list is filled out; the picker MUST refuse to render this row as the actual TReMoR3 until then. Subtension dictionary captures: ranging bars at top (extents 60-50-40-30-20-10 mil on opposing sides, plus secondary 70-60-50-40-30-20-10 mil markers); vertical drop scale 0 to 40 mil with secondary 1-mil-spaced lines and 0.2-mil minor hashes; 7 wind dots per side with 2nd wind dot on 4th mil drop line subtending 0.95 mil (calibration anchor); 0.1 mil chevron mil markers; 0.2 mil reticle hold points. Licensed to multiple scope brands (Nightforce, Schmidt & Bender, EOTech Vudu, US Optics, Bushnell, others).

subtensions.patent_status: Patented (Horus Rapid Range Bars, Wind Dots, chevron mil markers)
subtensions.calibration: USMC mils (6283 mils/circle) (1 mil = 3.60 inches at 100 yards)

notes: Subtensions transcribed from the official Nightforce MIL-XT reticle sheet (REV 0923). Center-dot 0.05 mil; main lines marked at 0.2 mil hash, 1 mil intervals labeled. Drop tree extends 12 mil below center. Main horizontal stadia approximately 10 mil per side. Available across the Nightforce ATACR F1, NX8 F1, and SHV F1 product lines. The element list is intentionally empty until a per-element painter migration converts the labeled subtension dictionary into renderable primitives; a free-form rendering still draws as a generic mil reticle.

Subtensions transcribed from the official Nightforce MOA-XT reticle sheet (REV 0323). MOA grid pattern: 1 MOA stadia hashes, labeled every 2 MOA on the main lines, drop tree extending to 32 MOA below center; bold dot every 4 MOA. Available in the same scope bodies as MIL-XT minus SHV. Element list intentionally empty until the per-element painter migration lands.

Subtensions transcribed from the official Nightforce MOAR First Focal Plane reticle sheet (rev 6/20). 2 MOA x 2 MOA floating center crosshair; 1 MOA elevation/windage spacings; 10/20/30 MOA elevation indicators (10/20 MOA windage indicators). Available with 20 or 30 MOA scale below center: 20 MOA scale on ATACR 5-25x56 F1 / B.E.A.S.T 5-25x56 F1; 30 MOA scale on ATACR 4-16x42 F1 / SHV 4-14x50 F1. Element list intentionally empty until the per-element painter migration lands.

subtensions.ranging_constant: Target size in inches / Image size (MOA) x 95.5 = range in yards

notes: Subtensions transcribed from the official Nightforce MOAR Second Focal Plane reticle sheet. 2 MOA x 2 MOA floating center crosshair; 1 MOA elevation/windage spacings. Available in ATACR 5-25x56 SFP, NXS 10x/15x/22x/32x, and SHV 10x/14x/20x. Per-model B/H/I subtensions vary -- ranging only valid at the labeled power setting per the manual (NXS 32x at 22x; SHV/ATACR all at max). 20 MOA scale below center: NXS 22x/32x; SHV 20x; ATACR 25x. 30 MOA scale: NXS 10x/15x; SHV 10x/14x.

subtensions.ranging_constant: Target size in inches / Image size (MOA) x 95.5 = range in yards

notes: Catalog placeholder for the Nightforce MIL-C F1 reticle. Floating 0.05 MRAD center dot; 0.2 MRAD main-line subtensions; numbered every other mil. Available across the ATACR F1 and NX8 F1 ranges. Subtension dictionary deliberately left null until the manufacturer's printable PDF is text-extracted into a structured spec; verified=false ensures the picker treats this as a placeholder rather than a render-ready row.

Subtension dictionary transcribed from the official Horus H59 Technical Data Sheet (Copyright 2018 Horus Vision; U.S. Pat. 6,032,374 / 5,920,995). Total horizontal extent ~10 mil per side on the main horizontal stadia; vertical drop tree from 0 to ~38 mil below center with secondary horizontal stadia every 1 mil. Christmas-tree style with 0.2-mil hash spacing inside the grid; 0.5-mil large hash marks calibrated for wind correction. Center dot 0.05 mil. Speed-shooting Horus Rapid Range Bars at top calibrated to 600 m. License: Horus Vision LLC -- the same reticle row should be wired to every scope brand that ships H59 (Schmidt & Bender, Leupold, Bushnell DMR, US Optics, Vortex Razor Gen II, etc.). Per-element renderable geometry not yet populated; verified=false ensures the picker doesn't attempt to draw an inaccurate Christmas-tree pattern as the genuine H59.

subtensions.calibration: USMC mils (6283 mils/circle) (1 mil = 3.60 inches at 100 yards)

notes: Subtension dictionary transcribed from the official Schmidt & Bender MSR2 reticle data sheet (rev 00). Center cross 1 x 1 mrad; main horizontal/vertical stadia continuous 1 mrad scale with 0.5 mrad division marks; line width 0.05 mrad. The MSR2 ranging stadia segments are calibrated to subtend 100 cm at 400 / 700 / 900 / 1200 / 1300 m respectively (T/U/W/X/Y in the data sheet). Available across the PM II 3-20x50 Ultra Short, 5-25x56, 3-27x56, and 5-45x56 High Power scope bodies.

Subtensions transcribed from the official Schmidt & Bender GR2ID reticle data sheet (5-25x56 PMII, scope type 77, FFP, rev 00). Christmas-tree grid with 0.5 mrad cell width, 1.0 mrad cell height. Center dot 0.05 mrad; main crosshair line width 0.04 mrad; secondary stadia 0.06 mrad; minor hash 0.2 mrad. The grid's red illumination at 1, 4, 5 mrad lines aids speed shooting. Available primarily on the PMII 5-25x56 (FFP) and the 3-20x50 Ultra Short / 6-36x56 High Performance variants.

Catalog placeholder for the Schmidt & Bender P4F-MIL reticle (P4 Fine, Mil-Radian). 0.1 mrad subtensions on a clean tactical hashes-only pattern; available on the PMII 5-25x56, 3-20x50 Ultra Short, and Police Sniper II series. Subtension dictionary deliberately left null until the per-reticle data sheet is captured (the schmidtundbender.de reticles page links to the official PDFs but their content has not yet been transcribed for this catalog). verified=false until populated.

Subtensions transcribed from the official Leupold FFP PR2-MIL reticle data sheet (Mark 5HD spec sheet). Designed for long-range PRS-style competition. Center dot 0.05 mil; large dot 0.50 mil; small dot 0.03 mil; main hash spacing 0.50 mil; outer line breaks 0.07 mil; fine line tick 0.10 mil; major hash 1.00 mil; line width 0.12 mil for primary stadia and 0.03 mil for fine secondary lines. Available in Mark 5HD 5-25x56, Mark 5HD 3.6-18x44, Mark 4HD 4.5-18x52. Field-of-view circles indicate the visible portion at high magnification (25x and 35x).

Catalog placeholder for the Leupold PR2-MOA reticle (MOA twin to PR2-MIL). Available in Mark 5HD M1C3 (1/4 MOA turret) and Mark 4HD M1C3 SKUs. Subtension dictionary deliberately left null until the published MOA reticle PDF is text-extracted; verified=false ensures the picker treats it as a placeholder.

Subtensions transcribed from the official Leupold FFP TMR (Tactical Milling Reticle) reticle data sheet for Mark 5HD / Mark 6 / Mark 8. Hash marks transition from 0.5 mil along the main stadia to 0.2 mil at outer edges; 0.05 mil dot diameter; 0.10 mil fine line tick; heavy lines 0.40 / 0.75 mil. Drop scale extends 30 mil below center.

Catalog placeholder for the Leupold HTMR (Heavy Tactical Milling Reticle) used in the VX-5HD 3-15x44 SFP body. Subtension dictionary deliberately left null until a per-reticle PDF is captured; verified=false ensures the picker treats this as a placeholder.
